div1.entryFree: Ballast, to load: who sent whole armadoes of caracks to be ballast, Err. III, 2, 141 (ballast for ballasted). then had my prize been less, and so more equal --ing to thee, Posthumus, Cymb. III, 6, 78, i. e. my freight would have been more equal in value to thine, I should not have been so much above thee in rank.
